# Configuration File - Version 1.0
# Application: DataProcessor
# Author: Team Alpha
# Last Updated: 2024-01-15

[general]
app_name = DataProcessor
version = 1.0.0
debug = false
log_level = info
max_threads = 4
timeout = 30

[database]
host = localhost
port = 5432
name = appdb
user = admin
password = REDACTED
pool_size = 10
pool_timeout = 5
ssl_mode = disable
retry_attempts = 3
retry_delay = 1000

[cache]
backend = redis
host = localhost
port = 6379
ttl = 3600
max_size = 1000
eviction_policy = lru
namespace = app_cache

[logging]
level = info
format = text
output = stdout
file_path = /var/log/app.log
max_file_size = 100
max_backups = 5
compress = true

[server]
host = 0.0.0.0
port = 8080
read_timeout = 30
write_timeout = 30
idle_timeout = 60
max_header_bytes = 1048576
enable_cors = true
cors_origins = *

[auth]
provider = local
token_expiry = 3600
refresh_expiry = 86400
secret_key = REDACTED
algorithm = HS256
bcrypt_cost = 10

[features]
enable_analytics = false
enable_notifications = true
enable_export = true
enable_import = true
enable_audit_log = false
enable_rate_limit = true
rate_limit_rps = 100
rate_limit_burst = 200

[storage]
provider = local
base_path = /data/uploads
max_file_size = 10485760
allowed_types = jpg,png,pdf,csv
temp_dir = /tmp/uploads

[email]
provider = smtp
host = smtp.example.com
port = 587
user = noreply@example.com
password = REDACTED
from = noreply@example.com
from_name = DataProcessor
use_tls = true

[metrics]
enabled = false
provider = prometheus
host = localhost
port = 9090
path = /metrics
interval = 15

[scheduler]
enabled = true
timezone = UTC
cleanup_job = 0 2 * * *
report_job = 0 8 * * 1
backup_job = 0 3 * * *

[api]
version = v1
base_path = /api
enable_swagger = true
swagger_path = /api/docs
rate_limit = true
pagination_default = 20
pagination_max = 100

[plugins]
enabled = false
dir = /plugins
auto_load = false

# Section: Processing Rules
[processing]
batch_size = 500
max_retries = 3
retry_delay = 2000
parallel_workers = 2
queue_size = 1000
dead_letter_queue = true

# Section: Monitoring
[monitoring]
enabled = true
interval = 60
alert_email = ops@example.com
alert_threshold_cpu = 80
alert_threshold_mem = 90
alert_threshold_disk = 85

# Section: Backup
[backup]
enabled = false
schedule = 0 1 * * *
destination = /backup
retention_days = 30
compress = true
encrypt = false

# EOF
